note: Full steps + code live in the plan .md (same task numbers). Spike-confirmed corrections (A1-A6, B1-B6) are in the plan's 'Spike grounding' section and are authoritative over spec v4.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Module scaffold + go.mod (x/tools bump) + Taskfile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Compiling, gofmt-clean module on feat/plan with the genqlient toolchain wired and the Go 1.26 x/tools blocker resolved.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] go build/vet ./... exit 0
- [ ] go.mod has `tool github.com/Khan/genqlient` AND forces golang.org/x/tools >= v0.46.0
- [ ] `task --list` shows check generate build schema vuln

**Verify:** `go build ./... && go vet ./... && gofmt -l . | wc -l` -> builds clean, 0 unformatted.

```json:metadata
{"files":["go.mod","go.sum","Taskfile.yml",".golangci.yml","doc.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./... && go vet ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["builds+vets clean","tool directive + x/tools>=v0.46.0","taskfile targets present"],"modelTier":"standard","note":"A2: go get -tool re-pins x/tools to broken v0.24.0; re-bump after."}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Vendor SDL v0.31.1 + version stamp + task schema
tasks.description:
**Goal:** schema/ holds all 30 v0.31.1 SDL files pinned to refs/tags/v0.31.1, stamped, with an idempotent refresh task and a generated version constant.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 30 graphql/schema/**.graphql files vendored at the tag
- [ ] schema/version.txt = v0.31.1; stash.SchemaVersion matches
- [ ] `task schema` is idempotent

**Verify:** `task schema && git diff --exit-code schema/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["schema/*.graphql","schema/version.txt","schema/version_gen.go","scripts/refresh-schema.sh"],"verifyCommand":"task schema && git diff --exit-code schema/","acceptanceCriteria":["30 SDL files at the tag","version stamp + constant","idempotent refresh"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: genops SDL parse + edge enumeration from AST
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load the SDL into a gqlparser AST; enumerate per-type scalars/enums and object/list edges strictly from the schema (B5 - never a hand list).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] LoadSchema over all 30 files, no error
- [ ] Edges/Scalars never invent fields; Performer.studios is NOT found (B5)
- [ ] root fields = 74 Query / 134 Mutation / 3 Subscription

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/genops/ -run TestParse -v` (Performer edges = {tags,scenes,groups,stash_ids}).

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/genops/parse.go","internal/genops/parse_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/genops/ -run TestParse -v","acceptanceCriteria":["root-field counts match","edges from AST only","Performer has no studios edge"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Ref + full fragments with flatten + canonical typenames
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Emit <Entity>Ref ({id,name/title} - B1) and <Entity>Fields fragments with @genqlient(typename:), and `# @genqlient(flatten: true)` on EVERY nested single-fragment-spread field (A1 - the mechanism that makes canonical types real).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] every entity has a Ref fragment {id, name|title} (error if neither exists)
- [ ] flatten emitted on the line ABOVE each nested ref/object field, NEVER above the operation (A1)
- [ ] after genqlient: SceneFields.Studio *StudioRef, .Tags []TagRef, .Files []VideoFileFields (canonical)

**Verify:** `task generate && go build ./...`; conformance TestCanonicalTypes green (Task 22).

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/genops/fragments.go","internal/genops/fragments_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"task generate && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["ref fragments {id,name/title}","flatten on every nested field","canonical field types after genqlient"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Path-based cycle termination + path-named exception allowlist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Terminate on revisiting a type on the path (emit its Ref); handle the two unavoidable path-named exceptions (A3): mixed-selection wrappers (SceneGroup/SceneMovie) and union fields (Image.visual_files), recorded in an allowlist.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] revisited type -> <Type>Ref, no recursion (Scene->Studio->Scene terminates)
- [ ] mixed-selection wrappers emit {scalars + ref-spread}; wrapper struct is path-named + allowlisted; inner object flattens to Ref
- [ ] union fields emit __typename + per-member inline fragments; type allowlisted
- [ ] exceptions.go lists exactly the allowlisted path-named types

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/genops -run TestCycle -v`; conformance canonical-stability passes WITH the allowlist. NOTE (B6): Group/Folder/GroupDescription cycles unmeasured on empty instance - Task 22 requires a seeded re-check.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/genops/cycle.go","internal/genops/exceptions.go","internal/genops/cycle_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/genops -run TestCycle -v","acceptanceCriteria":["path-based termination","wrapper + union exceptions allowlisted","no un-allowlisted path-named types"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Operation assembly (variables, ids:[ID!], __typename)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Assemble a complete named genqlient-valid operation per root field: deterministic name, variable per arg typed from SDL (prefer ids:[ID!] over deprecated [Int!] - A6), variables forwarded, __typename where interfaces/unions appear (A5).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] one op per root field; names collision-free + sorted
- [ ] args typed from SDL preserving !/nested; findScenes uses ids:[ID!]
- [ ] interface/union selections include __typename
- [ ] deterministic: regenerate twice byte-identical

**Verify:** `task generate && task generate && git diff --exit-code operations/generated/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/genops/operations.go","internal/genops/operations_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"task generate && task generate && git diff --exit-code operations/generated/","acceptanceCriteria":["one op per root field","ids:[ID!] form","__typename for interfaces/unions","byte-identical regen"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: manifest.json + catalog.json + overlay.yaml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** From the same AST pass emit operations/manifest.json (thin per-op index incl. overrides/islands, reading overlay.yaml for {destructive,job-returning}) and schema/catalog.json (resolved $defs inputs, enum symbols + separate descriptions, @deprecated reasons, derived per-command exit-code sets).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] manifest indexes all 211 root ops + overrides/islands; kind/inputType/destructive/job-returning
- [ ] catalog resolves nested inputs + *FilterType criterion shapes + AND/OR/NOT; every reachable enum's symbols; deprecation reasons
- [ ] overlay.yaml seeds destructive=[querySQL,execSQL,metadataImport,anonymiseDatabase,migrate] + the metadata* job-returning set

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/genops -run TestManifestCatalog -v`; `jq '."$defs".SceneFilterType' schema/catalog.json` resolves.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/genops/manifest.go","internal/genops/catalog.go","operations/overlay.yaml","internal/genops/manifest_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/genops -run TestManifestCatalog -v","acceptanceCriteria":["manifest covers all ops+overrides+islands","catalog resolves inputs/enums/deprecations","overlay seeded"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: genqlient.yaml + generate wiring + determinism
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire genqlient over the SDL + generated/override ops with the §10 scalar bindings; go generate runs genops then genqlient in order; the x/tools bump survives.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] bindings: Time->time.Time, Int64->int64, Map/Any->json.RawMessage, BoolMap->map[string]bool, Timestamp->string, Upload->stash.Upload, PluginConfigMap->map[string]any
- [ ] task generate clean from fresh checkout; go build green
- [ ] codegen-freshness: regenerate + git diff --exit-code clean

**Verify:** `task generate && go build ./... && task generate && git diff --exit-code`

```json:metadata
{"files":["genqlient.yaml","generate.go"],"verifyCommand":"task generate && go build ./... && task generate && git diff --exit-code","acceptanceCriteria":["all scalar bindings","ordered generate","freshness clean"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: ApiKey redaction for paths.stream + golden test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Keep paths in the default scene tier but redact the apikey query param from URLs in CLI output; prove no ApiKey JWT appears in default-policy output (B4, intersects §11).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] redactor strips/REDACTEDs apikey query param from any URL string
- [ ] golden: a sample findScenes default payload through the output layer contains no eyJ/apikey= token

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/stash -run TestRedact -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/stash/redact.go","cmd/stash/redact_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/stash -run TestRedact -v","acceptanceCriteria":["apikey param redacted","no JWT in default output (golden)"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: stash.Client (transport, ApiKey, URL normalize, options, env)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Client wrapping genqlient's HTTP client; ApiKey via RoundTripper; URL normalize (append /graphql; derive ws); functional options + env fallback; default bounded Timeout on HTTP path only; secret never logged.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] builds from env or options; ApiKey header on every request; URL normalized; ws URL derived
- [ ] secret redacted in slog (LogValue)

**Verify:** `go test ./stash -run TestClient -v` (httptest asserts ApiKey header + normalized path).

```json:metadata
{"files":["stash/client.go","stash/options.go","stash/client_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./stash -run TestClient -v","acceptanceCriteria":["env+options","ApiKey header","URL+ws normalize","secret redacted"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Typed error model + envelope
tasks.description:
**Goal:** *GraphQLError (carries the error list), transport/auth categories, %w chains, errors.As-friendly; the CLI error-envelope shape (code,message,graphql_errors,field,retryable).

**Verify:** `go test ./stash -run TestErrors -v` (GraphQL errors -> *GraphQLError; categories via errors.As).

```json:metadata
{"files":["stash/errors.go","stash/errors_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./stash -run TestErrors -v","acceptanceCriteria":["*GraphQLError carries list","categories via errors.As","%w chains"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Version handshake + compat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Client.Version(ctx) via version{version hash build_time}; compat vs stash.SchemaVersion (warn; CLI surfaces a distinct exit code/field).

**Verify:** `go test ./stash -run TestVersion -v`; integration: live handshake returns v0.31.1.

```json:metadata
{"files":["stash/version.go","stash/version_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./stash -run TestVersion -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Version() returns instance version","mismatch flagged"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Bounded fan-out (errgroup.WithContext + SetLimit)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** errgroup.WithContext (first error cancels) + SetLimit configurable bound; no retries.

**Verify:** `go test -race ./stash -run TestBatch -v` (bound respected; first error cancels; no retry).

```json:metadata
{"files":["stash/batch.go","stash/batch_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test -race ./stash -run TestBatch -v","acceptanceCriteria":["bound respected","first error cancels","no retry"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Subscription transport (gorilla WSConn) - write-serialized, keepalive, reconnect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** graphql.WSConn adapter over gorilla/websocket: inject ApiKey, SERIALIZE all writes (single-writer goroutine - gorilla forbids concurrent writers), client-side keepalive (Stash sends none on graphql-transport-ws), bounded reconnect-with-resubscribe.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] all 3 subscriptions stream typed events
- [ ] keepalive + protocol writes serialized (-race clean)
- [ ] drop surfaces per the --wait contract

**Verify:** `go test -race ./stash -run TestSubscription` (synctest); integration: live jobsSubscribe over idle socket (Task 23).

```json:metadata
{"files":["stash/subscriptions.go","stash/subscriptions_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test -race ./stash -run TestSubscription","acceptanceCriteria":["3 subs stream","writes serialized (-race)","keepalive+reconnect"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: importObjects multipart island (+ __typename rule)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hand-wired GraphQL-multipart sender for importObjects(input:{file:Upload!}) reusing Client transport/auth; any island selecting interface/union fields includes __typename (A5).

**Verify:** `go test ./stash -run TestImportObjects` (httptest asserts operations/map/file parts); integration with a real small file.

```json:metadata
{"files":["stash/importobjects.go","stash/importobjects_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./stash -run TestImportObjects","acceptanceCriteria":["multipart operations/map/file","reuses client transport/auth","__typename in any interface/union island"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: Generate cobra command tree from manifest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Emit cmd/stash/gen_commands.go from manifest.json under `stash <resource> <verb>`; subscriptions -> job watch/log tail/scan watch; islands hand-wired.

**Verify:** `task generate && go build ./cmd/stash && ./stash --help`; conformance asserts a command per manifest op.

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/genops/cli.go","cmd/stash/gen_commands.go"],"verifyCommand":"task generate && go build ./cmd/stash","acceptanceCriteria":["command per manifest op","3 subscription streamers","regenerates with surface"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 17: CLI output - JSON default, NDJSON, -o table|yaml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** JSON by default always (no TTY detection); NDJSON for lists/streams; -o table|yaml for humans; no built-in field filtering.

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/stash -run TestOutput -v`.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/stash/output.go","cmd/stash/output_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/stash -run TestOutput -v","acceptanceCriteria":["JSON default","NDJSON streams","-o table/yaml"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 18: CLI input - JSON-first + raw-JSON partial-update binding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** stdin/--input JSON; partial-update mutation inputs bound as RAW JSON (json.RawMessage/map) NOT genqlient typed structs - to preserve present/absent/null (stdlib JSON can't otherwise express the third state); convenience flags read/list-only (never inject mutation keys).

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/stash -run TestPartialUpdate` golden proves present/absent/null all survive.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/stash/input.go","cmd/stash/input_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/stash -run TestPartialUpdate -v","acceptanceCriteria":["raw-JSON partial-update binding","three states survive","flags read/list-only"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 19: CLI errors + exit codes (name,integer) table
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Structured JSON envelope on stderr; frozen (name,integer) taxonomy in AGENTS.md (ok,usage,auth,transport,validation,server-fault,not-found,destructive-refused,job-failed,still-running,unconfirmed); envelope code = name, exit status = integer.

**Verify:** golden per exit-code path.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/stash/errors.go","cmd/stash/errors_test.go","docs/AGENTS.md"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/stash -run TestExitCodes -v","acceptanceCriteria":["structured envelope","frozen (name,integer) table","code=name, exit=integer"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 20: stash catalog - embedded build-time artifact
tasks.description:
**Goal:** go:embed schema/catalog.json; stash catalog prints it verbatim (no runtime SDL parsing).

**Verify:** `./stash catalog | jq '."$defs", .commands'` resolves; conformance catalog-coverage green.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/stash/catalog.go","cmd/stash/catalog_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build ./cmd/stash && ./stash catalog | jq .","acceptanceCriteria":["embedded artifact printed verbatim","no runtime parsing"],"modelTier":"mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 21: --wait three-state drop contract + streaming + gating + entrypoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** --wait seeds with findJob then tracks jobsSubscribe; on drop: bounded reconnect -> findJob reconcile -> (terminal=exit; still-running=resume; indeterminate=unconfirmed+job id). --wait-timeout default unset=no client bound. NDJSON streamers. Destructive ops gated by --yes-i-understand -> destructive-refused. main.go entrypoint + env/flag config.

**Verify:** `go test -race ./cmd/stash -run TestWait` (synctest); integration: real multi-minute scan over idle socket (Task 23).

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/stash/wait.go","cmd/stash/stream.go","cmd/stash/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test -race ./cmd/stash -run TestWait","acceptanceCriteria":["three-state drop contract","--wait-timeout default unset","NDJSON streamers","destructive gating"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 22: Conformance suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The full gate set (each a sub-test).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] completeness (every SDL root field has a manifest op)
- [ ] SDL input/enum enumeration
- [ ] scalar round-trips incl. PluginConfigMap + Timestamp explicitly
- [ ] interface/union coverage on findFiles (BaseFile) + findImages (VisualFile) - NOT Scene (A4)
- [ ] recursive filter-input round-trip
- [ ] partial-update three-state golden
- [ ] canonical-type stability WITH the A3 exception allowlist
- [ ] catalog coverage (commands + enums/inputs resolve + symbols match SDL)
- [ ] exactly-one-Upload
- [ ] mutation-set drift gate (diff vs baseline -> forces overlay.yaml triage)
- [ ] ApiKey redaction incl. paths.stream (B4)
- [ ] determinism (regen twice byte-identical)
- [ ] seeded-instance re-validation of Gallery/Image/Group/GroupDescription (B6)

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/conformance/... -v && task check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/conformance/*_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/conformance/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["all 13 sub-gates green","A3 allowlist encoded","A4 on findFiles/findImages","B6 seeded re-check"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 23: synctest timing tests + two-tier harness
tasks.description:
**Goal:** testing/synctest for subscription lifecycle, --wait, errgroup; hermetic mock-server/golden default tier + opt-in //go:build integration tier (env-gated, skipped when absent) covering 3 subs, idle---wait keepalive/reconnect/reconcile, importObjects.

**Verify:** `go test -race ./...` (hermetic) green; `STASHAPP_URL=... go test -tags integration ./...` green live.

```json:metadata
{"files":["stash/*_synctest_test.go","stash/integration_test.go","internal/mockgql/"],"verifyCommand":"go test -race ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["synctest timing units","hermetic default tier","integration tier env-gated/skip"],"modelTier":"complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 24: task check / vuln / golangci-lint / CI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire all gates; minimal GitHub Actions (task check + task vuln).

**Verify:** `task check && task vuln`.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".golangci.yml",".github/workflows/ci.yml"],"verifyCommand":"task check && task vuln","acceptanceCriteria":["all gates wired","CI runs check+vuln"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 25: godoc + generated CLI reference + AGENTS.md + README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Doc comments on every exported symbol + runnable Examples; docs/cli/ from cobra; docs/AGENTS.md (exit-code table, error envelope, enum-symbol rule, multi-criterion example, --wait incl. unconfirmed re-attach, partial-update contract, per_page:-1 footgun, idempotency); README quickstart.

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run Example && golangci-lint run`.

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/AGENTS.md","docs/cli/","README.md","doc.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./... -run Example","acceptanceCriteria":["godoc + Examples","generated cli ref","AGENTS.md complete","README quickstart"],"modelTier":"standard"}
```
